entry.title: mtg-commander
entry.content: MTG Commander deck builder with multi-agent pipeline and adversarial challenger agents. Each primary step (Deck Builder, Rules Judge, Optimizer, Price Evaluator) is verified by a dedicated challenger in an independent correction loop. Synergy-first card selection via Scryfall API, format legality validation, structural optimization, budget enforcement with price goal escalation, and configurable loop caps via `.mtg-commander.yml`. Produces complete 100-card decklists.

entry.content: Deterministic, headless task orchestrator for Claude Code. Runs entirely on the Claude Code CLI/subscription via `claude -p` workers.

entry.title: codeforge
entry.content: + CFP-2587 (2026-07-09, plumbing) — Agent/Bash 수행 렌더-줄 프리픽스 `[에이전트명] MM/DD HH:MM - 내용` 를 hookSpecificOutput.updatedInput 으로 기계 주입 (detect→inject repurpose; whole-echo REPLACE-safe·bare updatedInput G4·fail-open; §7.3 additionalContext(story-transition-autonomy reminder) 무조건 emit; ADR-143 Amendment 1). FIX-2: §7.3 빈-prompt reminder 회귀 봉합(early-exit→fall-through) + idempotency leading-ws 대칭 + §7.7-2 subject-field-absent SKIP(Bash EXCLUDE 대칭) + surface-specific bypass env disjoint. + CFP-2584 (2026-07-06, plumbing) — 형제 워크플로 parser-parity: CFP-2581 same-repo 가드 패턴을 auto-phase-label tier-2(relatedRegex owner/repo#N optional capture + urlRegex owner capture, fork① ADOPT) + phase-gate-auto-cleanup EC-2(.test()→matchAll+filter 구조전환)에 이식. cross-repo owner/repo#N PR body 에서 phase 라벨 상속·stale cleanup silent-degrade 제거, foreign owner/repo#N skip(context.repo 고정 spoof 차단). related-only 키워드 유지(fork②). ADR-005 mirror(.github↔templates byte-identical) 동시 편집. §8 execution-liveness: shipped .yml 파서 추출·eval harness(하드카피 0) + 변이-kill 5종. 6-tuple·evidence·advisory CI non-required 무변경. + CFP-2581 (2026-07-05, plumbing) — phase-gate-mergeable localRefs 바인딩 파서 확장(S-primary): PR body 의 canonical Story issue ref 를 owner/repo#N same-repo 표기까지 직독(정규식 optional owner/repo capture + same-repo 가드), foreign owner/repo#N 은 skip(context.repo 고정 fetch spoof 차단 — 보안 강화). cross-repo 표기 PR 이 step-3 canonical-issue 직독에 도달해 lane 마다 수동 gate-라벨/evidence 미러 마찰 제거. bare #N superset 무손상. ADR-005 mirror(.github ↔ templates byte-identical) 동시 편집. §8 execution-liveness: shipped .yml 파서 블록 추출·eval harness(하드카피 0, drift 검출) + dead phase-gate-cfp2324.test.js 재배선(S2/S6/S7). 6-tuple contexts·evidence 채널·PR-라벨 fallback 무변경(비-goal diff-0). 6.70.0 → 6.70.1 PATCH(plumbing bugfix, ADR-037). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2573 (2026-07-05, ADR-144) — Orchestrator 자율성 종결(stop taxonomy 3축 + decision-null pause 신설): 애매 stop(vague-pause “한 숨 쉬어가자”) 을 taxonomy 에 명명·금지(L1 advisory ADR-025 Amd3 + presence-lint) + 자명-진행 priming scope 확장(L2 advisory 전환+lane경계+완료후+vague-pause, 신규 hook 0 기존 2채널 TEXT broaden) + delivery-gap liveness 강화(L3 detection measurement/recovery advisory: PL spawn-then-blind-wait 금지 + lead-collect seam + idle marker, ADR-139 Amd1, full auto-wake dispatcher DEFER) + stop-event aggregate 신설(L5 measurement record-only aggregate_stop_event.py, row-hash dedup, reason_class PMO sidecar, “측정≠분류” honesty) + consumer 전파(L6 hooks.json 자동) + tier 정직 meta-gate(AC-6 mutation oracle: measurement/advisory 축 block/deny/강제 언어 0). GAP-1/2(pre-utterance hard-block·over-halt 실시간 검출) platform 한계 정직 문서화(hollow-gate 금지). 예방(advisory)+측정(measurement)까지만. 6.69.0 → 6.70.0 MINOR (신규 hook TEXT broaden/lint/aggregate = 신규 capability, ADR-037). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2574 (2026-07-05, ADR-143) — Agent 액션 렌더 줄 프리픽스 규약: harness UI 의 Agent 스폰·도구호출 렌더 줄에 `[<agent_type>] MM/DD HH:MM - <내용>` 프리픽스 시도(범위① Agent spawn description=피스폰 agent_type / 범위② 서브에이전트 leaf 도구호출 description=self agent_type). 시각=KST(UTC+9 고정 산술, scripts/kst-render-stamp — datetime.now(timezone.utc)+9h·stdout-only·non-deprecated), 컴팩트 MM/DD HH:MM(offset/연도/초/KST 라벨 미표기, ADR-079 제3 ephemeral-UI sub-layer). TodoWrite 행 + Orchestrator inline 4종(대화/TodoWrite/읽기 Q&A/상태보고, ADR-039 whitelist) 제외. 강제 상한=advisory(no-theater, hard-gate/100% 기계강제 참칭 0): 범위①만 PreToolUse(Agent) warning-tier detect(spawn-description-prefix-detect.yml + scripts/check-spawn-description-prefix, exit-0-always·tool_input rewrite 없음), 범위②는 prompt-mandate + session-start 리마인더(mechanical 불가 정직 명문). CLAUDE.md directive + playbook 매턴 self-check + evidence-checks-registry 등록 + 컴팩트 예시 KST_TS_RE lint-inert. 13파일 초판 + FIX-1(§8 T-3 hook↔detector seam 계약이탈 해소 + no-epoch production 경로 커버리지 → test 16→24, 3-mutation replay PASS). 신규 ADR-143. 6.68.0 → 6.69.0 MINOR (신규 규약 workflow/hook = 신규 capability, ADR-037). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2572 (2026-07-05, ADR-142) — Orchestrator context 무경량화: READ/synthesis/verbose-return 위임 규율(L1 advisory read-offload + trivial carve-out CLOSED 6) + L2 return-envelope-v1 tight-return wrap 계약(measurement schema-lint + advisory prompt-mandate, runtime 하드캡 기각) + L7 self-context record-only proxy telemetry(spawn-event-v1 v1.1 self-context-v1 6-field, ADR-043 Amd3, never-block/fail-VISIBLE) + 3 self-test(disjoint-axis-whitelist-lint 물리강제 / return-envelope-schema-lint measurement / self-context-telemetry-allowlist-lint measurement+emission-liveness) + playbook §3.0/§3.3 반전 + stale doc(재귀-spawn platform-inherent 오단정) 정정. 6.67.0 → 6.68.0 MINOR (신규 workflow/hook/계약 = 신규 capability, ADR-037). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2563 (2026-07-03, ADR-133 Amendment 2 실배선) — ADR 번호 발급·예약 충돌 근본 해소: 기존 OCC atomic claim primitive(단일-셀 Contents API PUT sha→409, CFP-2491)를 실 ADR 발급 flow 에 실배선(built-but-unwired dead-machinery 해소) + adr-reservation-state long-lived branch 부트스트랩(seed max_adr_number=141 firsthand git ls-tree 재산출·하드코딩 금지 + branch protection allow_force_pushes:false / required_linear_history:true / enforce_admins:true + required_pull_request_reviews·required_status_checks 미설정 load-bearing — 걸면 claim direct-PUT deadlock) + agent-session write-under-protection empirical smoke(HTTP 200 실측 — R3 deadlock-avoidance 반증) + 3-way ADR 번호 uniqueness lint 신설(.github/workflows/adr-uniqueness-check.yml + scripts/lib/check-adr-uniqueness-3way.py — filename↔frontmatter adr_number↔ADR-RESERVATION row dual-key + numeric 정규화(zero-pad/quoted) + 구조적 파싱, warning tier / non-required / 6-tuple 무변경, #2182 흡수) + ADR-RESERVATION 15-row lapse backfill(idempotent append-only, scripts/lib/adr-reservation-backfill.py) + evidence-checks-registry adr-uniqueness-check warning entry 등록. 신규 ADR 0 (ADR-133 Amendment 2 만). 6.65.0 → 6.66.0 MINOR (신규 workflow adr-uniqueness-check.yml = 신규 capability, ADR-037). marketplace version sync(ADR-063, sync PR 선행 merge). + CFP-2549 (2026-07-02) — background-wait liveness gate (ADR-139) 실배선: 모든 codeforge-owned background subagent 대기(run_in_background/bg spawn)의 wall-clock 상한+liveness 관측 없는 무한 대기 결함(#763 Iter4/5)을 CFP-2545 codex-companion 의 Ports&Adapters 일반화로 근절. playbook 공통 단락 INV-L1~L4(max-wait ceiling/fail-open 금지 inconclusive/0-byte≠stall 3-state/Orchestrator 소유) + general-adapter presence lint(liveness_check_base.py base + check_subagent_wait_liveness_presence.py + byte-identical workflow, warning tier) + execution-backed self-test(124/127) + parallel-dispatch-protocol v1.1(worker_outcomes +INCONCLUSIVE) + sibling ADR-081 Amd13/ADR-039 Amd10 §결정 20. 신규 required check 0. 6.61.0 → 6.63.0 MINOR. |+ CFP-2544 (2026-07-02) — Orchestrator inline-write gate 신설 (Wave1 warning-tier): ADR-039 Amendment 9 §결정 9 deferred slot("Orchestrator inline write detect hook") 실현 + ADR-115 Amendment 1 §결정 6 scope-boundary 이관. PreToolUse(Write|Edit|MultiEdit) 물리 가드로 최상위 세션(Orchestrator)의 repo/worktree 직접 편집을 caller-scoped 검출 — 실측 83세션 127건 드리프트(worktree 95 + 직접 32) 폐지. discriminator = PreToolUse payload `agent_id` 필드 (non-empty=subagent=allow / 부재·null·""=Orchestrator=block-candidate, F2 fail-safe). path ordering invariant = worktree(~/.claude/worktrees/) 체크가 memory(~/.claude/) carve-out 보다 먼저(load-bearing subset — 뒤집으면 95건 무력화). Wave1 = warning-tier(stderr block 마커 + exit 0, NEVER exit 2, ADR-115 §결정 5 fail-open). 신규 파일 — hooks/pretooluse-inline-write-gate (extensionless polyglot, pretooluse-agent-spawn-gate warning skeleton 미러) + scripts/check-inline-write-gate.sh (ADR-061 thin wrapper, SSOT 부재 fail-open) + scripts/lib/check_inline_write_gate.py (verifier SSOT, _read_payload/_check_bypass/_classify_agent/_classify_path 4-func, check_repo_confinement.py _norm realpath 재사용) + hooks/tests/test_pretooluse_inline_write_gate.py (pytest 14-case discriminating fixture + §8.7 design-confirm 3종: MultiEdit live schema / distinct sentinel 2종 / relative-path cwd-resolve). hooks.json PreToolUse += Write|Edit|MultiEdit matcher. evidence-checks-registry += runtime-hook-pretooluse-inline-write-presence (5번째 family member, warning-tier, declarative anchor — presence-lint 기계배선은 family 전체 declarative-only 이므로 follow-up 분리). BYPASS_INLINE_WRITE_GATE env(audit trail, block 마커와 distinct sentinel). Wave2 deny 승격 = ADR-060 evidence-gate (PR≥20 + bypass 외 failure=0 + sibling merged) 후 별 CFP. 신규 ADR 0(ADR-039 Amd9 + ADR-115 Amd1 paired amendment) / required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경. 6.61.0 → 6.62.0 MINOR (신규 runtime hook = 기능추가, ADR-037 (d)). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2545 (2026-07-02) — Codex companion 브로커 경로 wall-clock 가드 배선 (ADR-081 Amendment 12 §결정 D14, dogfood wrapper-self Phase 2): 실 리뷰 worker 호출부 CodexReviewAgent.md:89 `node codex-companion.mjs adversarial-review --wait`(4 리뷰 lane 공유) companion `request()` deadline 부재 → stall 시 node·Bash·worker·Orchestrator 무한 대기(~2h silent hang carrier)를 `timeout ${CODEX_REVIEW_TIMEOUT_SEC:-300} --kill-after=${CODEX_REVIEW_KILL_AFTER_SEC:-30}` wall-clock ceiling 으로 근절. N=추정값 empirical 미실증(env-override, lock-in 금지) + lane override(_SECURITY/_DESIGN) + consumer hardcap 900s. exit 124(timeout kill) → fail-mode enum #8 재사용 marker `[codex-sandbox-fallback: dispatch_stall_or_stream_timeout]` + verdict=inconclusive (fail-open 금지 — PASS-only-if-explicit, exit 0+verdict부재=inconclusive, 부분 stall ANY→전체 inconclusive). AC-1 mechanical 강제 = presence-grep lint (scripts/lib/check_codex_companion_timeout_presence.py Python SSOT ADR-061 + thin wrapper + templates/+.github byte-identical workflow ADR-005): dispatch 발화 timeout <N> prefix(리터럴 or ${VAR:-int} env-default) + --kill-after 동반 + N 양수 + hollow-gate 차단 I-3(파일 존재 시 발화 ≥1, 발화 0건→exit1) + 경로부재 fail-open(consumer no-op). self-test 8-case RED→GREEN discriminating + mutation proof(가드 제거 시 PASS→RED firsthand 실증). evidence-checks-registry codex-companion-timeout-presence entry(warning tier) + label-registry-v2 hotfix-bypass:codex-companion-timeout-presence(2.102→2.103, 103번째 family). playbook §3.10 companion sub-paragraph(wall-clock ceiling + Orchestrator liveness 게이트 보조 2차 + timeout N < liveness max-wait 순서) + review-pl-base.md cross-ref. 신규 required check 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경(ADR-127 ratchet). 6.60.3 → 6.61.0 MINOR (신규 companion wall-clock 거버넌스 behavior + 신규 wrapper script/workflow = ADR-037 (d)). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2530 (2026-07-01) — css-lint.yml job-level if: hashFiles(...) context-availability 위반 born-invalid gate 정정 (ADR-136 결정13 Amendment 2): hashFiles 는 step-level 전용이라 job-level if 는 workflow load-time schema-invalid → D1 게이트가 css-lint.yml 신설(PR #2511) 이래 0회 로드/실행. job-level if 삭제 → step-level 가드 + in-job fast-exit(경로C genuine pass) 단일 채널. 재발 봉인 = 신규 actionlint-workflows-test.yml(wrapper-self, job-level hashFiles 재삽입 mutation → actionlint exit!=0 hard-fail) + templates/ coverage. 양 copy byte-identical parity. PATCH 6.60.3. + CFP-2527 (2026-07-01) — css-lint.yml --config-basedir 누락 hollow-gate 정정 (ADR-136 결정12 Amendment 1): 격리 toolchain($RUNNER_TEMP/css-lint-toolchain/node_modules) 에 STYLELINT_BASEDIR GITHUB_ENV export + floor self-check(--print-config) 와 실 lint run 양쪽에 --config-basedir 부착 → consumer verbatim 채택 시 stylelint extends:stylelint-config-standard resolution 실패(ConfigurationError, rule 평가 이전 사망)로 게이트가 단 한 줄도 lint 못하던 reached-but-dead hollow-gate 복구. 양 copy(.github + templates) byte-identical parity. test-css-lint.sh C5 consumer-형상 discriminating fixture 신설. PATCH 6.60.2. + CFP-2523 (2026-06-30) — schema-lib archive/adr existence-guard dead-path 활성 + 10 ADR backfill (atomic Phase 2, CFP-2519 후속): check_doc_frontmatter.py REQUIRED + check_doc_section_schema.py REQUIRED_SECTIONS 에 "archive/adr" 키 확장-only 추가 — wrapper ADR(archive/adr/) 가 docs/adr-only 키로 silent skip 되던 existence-guard dead-path 활성. naive 활성 시 FAIL 할 10 ADR (frontmatter 1 = ADR-042-mc closing delimiter / section 9 = 116/117/118/122/127/128/129/132/133)을 3-way TYPE(안전 rename / 신규 섹션 from related_files / 상태 from frontmatter)으로 동일 PR HEAD tree 에 atomic backfill — 관련 ADR 류 섹션(127/128/129 ## 관련 + 133 ## 관련 ADR)은 보존 + 별도 ## 관련 파일 신설(의미오염 차단). 141 ADR 전수 PASS(fm/sec exit=0) 실측. consumer 무해(existence-guard). PATCH 6.59.3. + CFP-2519 (2026-06-30) — docs/adr→archive/adr dead-path 클래스 sweep (functional 3 + stale-ref 2, CFP-2515 후속, Phase 2): CFP-2515 가 adr-sunset-criteria.yml 단일 dead-gate 만 정정하며 남긴 동형 dead-path 클래스(wrapper ADR 이 사는 archive/adr/ 를 미점검하는 docs/adr-only path 패턴)의 잔여 sweep. wrapper 는 ADR 을 archive/adr/ 에 두고 consumer 는 docs/adr/ 를 써, docs/adr-only path 는 consumer 정상·wrapper-self 비대칭 dead-gate. CFP-2515/CFP-2491 확립 path-agnostic 해법((docs|archive)/adr alternation / 2-entry glob)을 적용. entry.title: claude-statusbar
entry.content: Lightweight Claude Code status-line monitor with switchable styles, themes, slash commands, and a local AgentParty bridge for Codex workflows. v3.29.6 clarifies the support boundary: Claude Code remains the full native statusLine data source for quota/session/context/cache/activity fields; Codex support is the local AgentParty presence bridge and never calls AgentParty, reads tokens, makes network requests, or adds OpenAI quota accounting. v3.29.5 makes launchd/systemd-spawned daemons recognizable to `cs daemon stop` and the upgrade drift-kill (they were unkillable), and stops an exiting daemon from deleting the current owner's pidfile. v3.29.4 makes `cs upgrade` the single documented upgrade path and fixes the daemon's silent auto-upgrade failure under launchd/systemd (uv/pipx not on the service PATH). v3.29.3 fixes the same respawn loop on Linux/systemd (Restart=on-failure) and reads the new AgentParty listener.mentions_only contract field instead of probing argv. v3.29.2 stops launchd from respawning a redundant daemon every 10s and cuts warm render time from ~6ms to ~2.4ms. v3.29.1 fixes a daemon crash on any render slower than the tick interval (a negative time.sleep()) — the reason the daemon kept dying and never picked up upgrades. v3.29.0 redesigns the AgentParty block (monochrome glyphs, listening state stated outright, last message on its own line with unread/@mention markers) and fixes the listener heartbeat field that made every live listener render as `down`, plus three daemon defects that kept an upgrade from reaching the running daemon. Requires the cs CLI from PyPI (pip install claude-statusbar or uv tool install claude-statusbar).

entry.title: ai-founder-kb
entry.content: Queryable knowledge base of AI startup founder learnings, frameworks, and podcast transcripts. ~400 curated insights from 150+ founders + 1,600+ raw transcripts (Sequoia, 20VC, Dwarkesh, Acquired, Latent Space, Cheeky Pint, Cognitive Revolution, Lenny's).
